messages.content: You generate only valid python-pptx code. Use XL_CHART_TYPE (not ChartType) for charts; guard slide.shapes.title for None; return only complete runnable Python code without Markdown fences or section headings.

Create a Python script using python-pptx to generate a 15-slide corporate presentation for C-Suite executives detailing Q4 Financial Results. The style must be strictly professional with a navy and white color palette, featuring pie charts for revenue breakdowns. Save the final file as "Q4_Financials.pptx". All presentation content must be written in English using a 16:9 Widescreen slide layout. You are strictly prohibited from using any external APIs, web scraping, or internet access to fetch data or assets; all content and logic must be generated purely within the script. When creating charts, you must strictly use XL_CHART_TYPE from the library; do not import or use ChartType from pptx.enum.chart. Before setting text on a title shape, always verify that slide.shapes.title is not None first to prevent errors. Your response must be structured with distinct # Thinking and # Assistant sections. All Python code must be enclosed in ```python fences, and all non-code text must be enclosed in ```text fences.

import os
from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN, MSO_ANCHOR
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
from pptx.enum.chart import XL_CHART_TYPE


# ── Deck Constants ───────────────────────────────────────────────

SLIDE_WIDTH = Inches(13.333)
SLIDE_HEIGHT = Inches(7.5)
MARGIN_LEFT = Inches(0.6)
MARGIN_RIGHT = Inches(0.6)
MARGIN_TOP = Inches(0.4)
MARGIN_BOTTOM = Inches(0.4)

NAVY = RGBColor(10, 35, 66)
WHITE = RGBColor(255, 255, 255)
LIGHT_GRAY = RGBColor(245, 245, 245)
ACCENT_BLUE = RGBColor(30, 136, 229)
GOLD = RGBColor(255, 215, 0)
DARK_GRAY = RGBColor(80, 80, 80)
MEDIUM_GRAY = RGBColor(150, 150, 150)

FONT_HEADING = "Calibri"
FONT_BODY = "Calibri"
CARD_BG = RGBColor(248, 250, 252)
CARD_BORDER = RGBColor(200, 210, 220)


# ── Helpers ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────

def hex_to_rgb(hex_str):
    h = hex_str.lstrip("#")
    return RGBColor(int(h[0:2], 16), int(h[2:4], 16), int(h[4:6], 16))


def set_slide_background(prs, slide, color_hex="#0A2342"):
    bg = slide.background
    fill = bg.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)


def add_text_box(slide, left, top, width, height, text, font_size=18, bold=False, color=None, alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT, font_name=FONT_BODY):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = alignment
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text
    run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    run.font.bold = bold
    run.font.name = font_name
    if color:
        run.font.color.rgb = color
    return txBox


def add_card(slide, left, top, width, height, title="", body="", bg_color=CARD_BG, border_color=CARD_BORDER):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = bg_color
    shape.line.color.rgb = border_color
    shape.line.width = Pt(1)
    if title:
        add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.2), top + Inches(0.15), width - Inches(0.4), Inches(0.35), title, font_size=14, bold=True, color=NAVY, font_name=FONT_HEADING)
    if body:
        add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.2), top + Inches(0.55), width - Inches(0.4), height - Inches(0.7), body, font_size=11, color=DARK_GRAY)
    return shape


def add_section_label(slide, left, top, text, font_size=16, color=NAVY):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, Inches(8), Inches(0.5))
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text.upper()
    run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    run.font.bold = True
    run.font.color.rgb = color
    run.font.name = FONT_HEADING
    return txBox


def add_footer(slide, slide_num, total=15):
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(6.0), Inches(7.0), Inches(1.333), Inches(0.4), f"{slide_num} / {total}", font_size=9, color=MEDIUM_GRAY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, path, left, top, width, height):
    if os.path.exists(path):
        slide.shapes.add_picture(path, left, top, width, height)
    else:
        shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
        shape.fill.solid()
        shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = LIGHT_GRAY
        shape.line.color.rgb = MEDIUM_GRAY
        shape.line.width = Pt(1)
        add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.1), top + Inches(0.1), width - Inches(0.2), height - Inches(0.2), "Image Placeholder", font_size=10, color=MEDIUM_GRAY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)


def safe_set_title(slide, text):
    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = text
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(0.3), Inches(12), Inches(0.8), text, font_size=28, bold=True, color=NAVY, font_name=FONT_HEADING)


# ── Slide Builders ───────────────────────────────────────────────

def build_title_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])  # Blank layout
    set_slide_background(prs, slide, "#0A2342")
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(1.8), Inches(10.3), Inches(1.2), "Q4 Financial Results", font_size=44, bold=True, color=WHITE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER, font_name="Calibri Light")
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(3.2), Inches(10.3), Inches(0.6), "FY 2024 Performance Review", font_size=24, color=GOLD, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(4.0), Inches(10.3), Inches(0.5), "Prepared for the Board of Directors and Executive Leadership Team", font_size=14, color=MEDIUM_GRAY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
    add_footer(slide, 1)


def build_executive_summary(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[5])
    set_slide_background(prs, slide, "#FFFFFF")
    safe_set_title(slide, "Executive Summary")
    add_section_label(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.2), "Key Highlights — Q4 2024")

    metrics = [
        ("Total Revenue", "$4.8B", "+12% YoY"),
        ("Net Income", "$920M", "+15% YoY"),
        ("EPS (Diluted)", "$3.42", "+18% YoY"),
        ("Operating Margin", "22.5%", "+180 bps"),
    ]

    card_w = Inches(2.7)
    gap = Inches(0.2)
    start_x = Inches(0.6)
    y_pos = Inches(2.0)

    for i, (label, value, change) in enumerate(metrics):
        x = start_x + i * (card_w + gap)
        add_card(slide, x, y_pos, card_w, Inches(1.8), title=label, body=f"{value}\n{change}", bg_color=NAVY if i == 0 else CARD_BG, border_color=GOLD if i == 0 else CARD_BORDER)

    add_footer(slide, 2)


def build_revenue_overview(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[5])
    set_slide_background(prs, slide, "#FFFFFF")
    safe_set_title(slide, "Revenue Overview")
    add_section_label(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.2), "Annual Revenue Performance")

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.8), Inches(5), Inches(0.4), "FY 2024 Total Revenue: $17.2 Billion", font_size=18, bold=True, color=NAVY)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(2.3), Inches(5), Inches(0.3), "+9% Year-over-Year Growth", font_size=14, color=ACCENT_BLUE)

    bullets = [
        "Revenue exceeded guidance by $380M (+2.2%)",
        "Enterprise segment drove 60% of total revenue growth",
        "International markets contributed 35% of incremental revenue",
        "Recurring revenue base grew to 72% of total mix",
    ]

    y = Inches(2.8)
    for bullet in bullets:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), y, Inches(10), Inches(0.35), f"• {bullet}", font_size=14, color=DARK_GRAY)
        y += Inches(0.4)

    add_footer(slide, 3)


def build_revenue_breakdown_pie(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[5])
    set_slide_background(prs, slide, "#FFFFFF")
    safe_set_title(slide, "Revenue Breakdown by Segment")
    add_section_label(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.2), "FY 2024 Revenue Composition")

    from pptx.chart.data import CategoryChartData
    chart_data = CategoryChartData()
    chart_data.categories = ["Products", "Services", "Licensing", "Other"]
    chart_data.add_series("Revenue ($M)", (6840, 4560, 3040, 760))

    left = Inches(1.2)
    top = Inches(1.8)
    width = Inches(5.5)
    height = Inches(4.5)

    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(XL_CHART_TYPE.PIE, left, top, width, height, chart_data)
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    chart.has_legend = True
    chart.legend.include_in_layout = False
    legend = chart.legend
    legend.font.size = Pt(12)
    legend.font.color.rgb = NAVY

    plot = chart.plots[0]
    plot.has_data_labels = True
    data_labels = plot.data_labels
    data_labels.font.size = Pt(11)
    data_labels.font.bold = True
    data_labels.font.color.rgb = NAVY
    data_labels.number_format = '#,##0'

    # Color the slices (PieSeries does not expose data_points; use default coloring)
    series = chart.series[0]
    series.format.line.color.rgb = WHITE
    series.format.line.width = Pt(1)

    add_footer(slide, 4)


def build_quarterly_comparison(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[5])
    set_slide_background(prs, slide, "#FFFFFF")
    safe_set_title(slide, "Quarterly Comparison")
    add_section_label(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.2), "Q1–Q4 2024 Performance Metrics")

    quarters = ["Q1", "Q2", "Q3", "Q4"]
    revenues = ["$3.8B", "$4.1B", "$4.5B", "$4.8B"]
    margins = ["19.2%", "20.1%", "21.3%", "22.5%"]

    y_start = Inches(2.0)
    for i, q in enumerate(quarters):
        x_base = Inches(0.6) + i * Inches(3.0)
        add_card(slide, x_base, y_start, Inches(2.7), Inches(1.5), title=q, body=f"Revenue: {revenues[i]}\nMargin: {margins[i]}", bg_color=NAVY if i == 3 else CARD_BG, border_color=GOLD if i == 3 else CARD_BORDER)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(4.2), Inches(12), Inches(0.8), "Sequential growth accelerated through Q4 as enterprise adoption and international expansion drove strong momentum across all segments.", font_size=13, color=DARK_GRAY)
    add_footer(slide, 5)


def build_profit_loss(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[5])
    set_slide_background(prs, slide, "#FFFFFF")
    safe_set_title(slide, "Profit & Loss Highlights")
    add_section_label(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.2), "Income Statement Summary — Q4 2024")

    items = [
        ("Total Revenue", "$4,800M"),
        ("Cost of Revenue", "$2,352M"),
        ("Gross Profit", "$2,448M"),
        ("Operating Expenses", "$1,368M"),
        ("Operating Income", "$1,080M"),
        ("Net Income", "$920M"),
    ]

    y = Inches(1.8)
    for label, value in items:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), y, Inches(5), Inches(0.35), label, font_size=14, color=DARK_GRAY)
        bold_color = NAVY if "Revenue" in label or "Income" in label else DARK_GRAY
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(7.5), y, Inches(2.5), Inches(0.35), value, font_size=14, bold=True, color=bold_color, alignment=PP_ALIGN.RIGHT)
        y += Inches(0.4)

    add_footer(slide, 6)


def build_cost_analysis(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[5])
    set_slide_background(prs, slide, "#FFFFFF")
    safe_set_title(slide, "Cost Analysis")
    add_section_label(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.2), "Operating Expense Breakdown — Q4 2024")

    costs = [
        ("COGS", "$2,352M", "49%"),
        ("R&D", "$480M", "10%"),
        ("SG&A", "$620M", "13%"),
        ("Other OpEx", "$268M", "6%"),
    ]

    card_w = Inches(2.7)
    gap = Inches(0.25)
    start_x = Inches(0.6)
    y_pos = Inches(2.0)

    for i, (label, amount, pct) in enumerate(costs):
        x = start_x + i * (card_w + gap)
        add_card(slide, x, y_pos, card_w, Inches(1.8), title=label, body=f"{amount}\n{pct} of Revenue", bg_color=CARD_BG, border_color=ACCENT_BLUE if i == 0 else CARD_BORDER)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(4.5), Inches(12), Inches(0.8), "Cost optimization initiatives reduced operating expenses by $120M year-over-year while maintaining investment in growth areas.", font_size=13, color=DARK_GRAY)
    add_footer(slide, 7)


def build_cash_flow(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[5])
    set_slide_background(prs, slide, "#FFFFFF")
    safe_set_title(slide, "Cash Flow Statement")
    add_section_label(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.2), "FY 2024 Cash Flow Summary")

    flows = [
        ("Operating Activities", "$1,850M"),
        ("Investing Activities", "-$720M"),
        ("Financing Activities", "-$980M"),
        ("Free Cash Flow", "$1,130M"),
    ]

    y = Inches(1.8)
    for label, value in flows:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), y, Inches(5), Inches(0.4), label, font_size=16, bold=True, color=NAVY)
        val_color = NAVY if "Free" in label else ACCENT_BLUE
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(7.5), y, Inches(2.5), Inches(0.4), value, font_size=18, bold=True, color=val_color, alignment=PP_ALIGN.RIGHT)
        y += Inches(0.6)

    add_footer(slide, 8)


def build_balance_sheet(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[5])
    set_slide_background(prs, slide, "#FFFFFF")
    safe_set_title(slide, "Balance Sheet Snapshot")
    add_section_label(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.2), "As of December 31, 2024")

    assets = [
        ("Cash & Equivalents", "$5,200M"),
        ("Accounts Receivable", "$2,800M"),
        ("Total Current Assets", "$9,600M"),
        ("Property & Equipment", "$3,100M"),
        ("Goodwill & Intangibles", "$4,500M"),
        ("Total Assets", "$17,200M"),
    ]

    liabilities = [
        ("Accounts Payable", "$1,800M"),
        ("Short-Term Debt", "$900M"),
        ("Long-Term Debt", "$4,200M"),
        ("Total Liabilities", "$7,500M"),
    ]

    equity = [
        ("Shareholders' Equity", "$9,700M"),
        ("Retained Earnings", "$6,800M"),
    ]

    y = Inches(1.8)
    for label, value in assets:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), y, Inches(5), Inches(0.35), f"  {label}", font_size=14, color=DARK_GRAY)
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(7.5), y, Inches(2.5), Inches(0.35), value, font_size=14, bold=True, color=NAVY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.RIGHT)
        y += Inches(0.35)

    y = Inches(4.0)
    for label, value in liabilities:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(7.2), y, Inches(5), Inches(0.35), f"  {label}", font_size=14, color=DARK_GRAY)
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(10.8), y, Inches(2.0), Inches(0.35), value, font_size=14, bold=True, color=NAVY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.RIGHT)
        y += Inches(0.35)

    for label, value in equity:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(7.2), y, Inches(5), Inches(0.35), f"  {label}", font_size=14, color=DARK_GRAY)
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(10.8), y, Inches(2.0), Inches(0.35), value, font_size=14, bold=True, color=NAVY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.RIGHT)
        y += Inches(0.35)

    add_footer(slide, 9)


def build_kpi_dashboard(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[5])
    set_slide_background(prs, slide, "#FFFFFF")
    safe_set_title(slide, "Key Performance Indicators")
    add_section_label(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.2), "Q4 2024 KPI Dashboard")

    kpis = [
        ("Customer Acquisition", "12,500", "+22%"),
        ("Churn Rate", "3.2%", "-0.8pp"),
        ("NPS Score", "72", "+5pts"),
        ("ARR Growth", "28%", "+4pp"),
    ]

    card_w = Inches(2.7)
    gap = Inches(0.25)
    start_x = Inches(0.6)
    y_pos = Inches(1.9)

    for i, (label, value, change) in enumerate(kpis):
        x = start_x + i * (card_w + gap)
        add_card(slide, x, y_pos, card_w, Inches(2.0), title=label, body=f"{value}\n{change}", bg_color=NAVY if i % 2 == 0 else CARD_BG, border_color=GOLD if i % 2 == 0 else CARD_BORDER)

    add_footer(slide, 10)


def build_market_position(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[5])
    set_slide_background(prs, slide, "#FFFFFF")
    safe_set_title(slide, "Market Position")
    add_section_label(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.2), "Competitive Landscape & Market Share")

    bullets = [
        "Market share increased to 18% in core enterprise segment",
        "Ranked #3 globally by revenue among direct competitors",
        "Customer satisfaction score of 4.6/5.0 (industry avg: 3.9)",
        "Net promoter score of 72, significantly above industry average of 45",
        "Expanded presence in APAC region with 15 new enterprise clients",
    ]

    y = Inches(1.8)
    for bullet in bullets:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), y, Inches(12), Inches(0.4), f"▸ {bullet}", font_size=14, color=DARK_GRAY)
        y += Inches(0.5)

    add_footer(slide, 11)


def build_strategic_initiatives(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[5])
    set_slide_background(prs, slide, "#FFFFFF")
    safe_set_title(slide, "Strategic Initiatives")
    add_section_label(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.2), "Key Growth Drivers for FY 2025")

    initiatives = [
        ("AI & Machine Learning Platform", "Launch of proprietary AI platform targeting enterprise customers with projected $800M ARR contribution by end of FY 2025."),
        ("International Expansion", "Entry into 12 new markets across APAC and EMEA, supported by localized product offerings and regional partnerships."),
        ("Product Innovation Pipeline", "Release of 4 major product updates including next-generation analytics suite and enhanced security capabilities."),
        ("Strategic Acquisitions", "Completed acquisition of DataSync Inc. for $350M to strengthen data integration capabilities and accelerate time-to-market."),
    ]

    y = Inches(1.8)
    for i, (title, desc) in enumerate(initiatives):
        add_card(slide, Inches(0.6), y, Inches(12.1), Inches(1.3), title=title, body=desc, bg_color=CARD_BG, border_color=ACCENT_BLUE if i == 0 else CARD_BORDER)
        y += Inches(1.5)

    add_footer(slide, 12)


def build_risk_factors(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[5])
    set_slide_background(prs, slide, "#FFFFFF")
    safe_set_title(slide, "Risk Factors & Mitigation")
    add_section_label(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.2), "Key Risks and Management Strategies")

    risks = [
        ("Macroeconomic Uncertainty", "Diversified revenue base across 45 countries reduces geographic concentration risk."),
        ("Competitive Pressure", "Continuous R&D investment of $480M annually maintains technology leadership position."),
        ("Regulatory Compliance", "Dedicated compliance team and proactive engagement with regulators worldwide."),
        ("Cybersecurity Threats", "Investment in zero-trust architecture and 24/7 SOC operations."),
    ]

    y = Inches(1.8)
    for i, (title, desc) in enumerate(risks):
        add_card(slide, Inches(0.6), y, Inches(5.8), Inches(1.3), title=title, body=desc, bg_color=CARD_BG, border_color=GOLD if i == 0 else CARD_BORDER)
        x2 = Inches(7.0)
        add_card(slide, x2, y, Inches(5.8), Inches(1.3), title=f"Mitigation {i+1}", body=desc, bg_color=CARD_BG, border_color=ACCENT_BLUE if i == 0 else CARD_BORDER)
        y += Inches(1.5)

    add_footer(slide, 13)


def build_outlook_q1(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[5])
    set_slide_background(prs, slide, "#FFFFFF")
    safe_set_title(slide, "Outlook for Q1 Next Year")
    add_section_label(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.2), "Q1 2025 Guidance and Projections")

    projections = [
        ("Revenue", "$4.9B – $5.1B"),
        ("EPS (Diluted)", "$3.50 – $3.70"),
        ("Operating Margin", "22% – 23%"),
        ("Free Cash Flow", "$1.2B – $1.4B"),
    ]

    y = Inches(1.8)
    for label, value in projections:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), y, Inches(5), Inches(0.4), label, font_size=18, bold=True, color=NAVY)
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(7.5), y, Inches(3.5), Inches(0.4), value, font_size=20, bold=True, color=ACCENT_BLUE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.RIGHT)
        y += Inches(0.6)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(4.8), Inches(12), Inches(1.5), "Management expects continued momentum driven by strong enterprise demand, successful product launches, and international expansion efforts. Full-year 2025 revenue guidance of $19B–$19.5B reflects confidence in sustained growth trajectory.", font_size=13, color=DARK_GRAY)
    add_footer(slide, 14)


def build_thank_you(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(prs, slide, "#0A2342")
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(2.5), Inches(10.3), Inches(1.0), "Thank You", font_size=48, bold=True, color=WHITE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(3.7), Inches(10.3), Inches(0.6), "Questions & Discussion", font_size=22, color=GOLD, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(4.8), Inches(10.3), Inches(0.5), "investor.relations@company.com  |  +1 (555) 012-3456", font_size=14, color=MEDIUM_GRAY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
    add_footer(slide, 15)


# ── Main ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

def main():
    prs = Presentation()
    prs.slide_width = SLIDE_WIDTH
    prs.slide_height = SLIDE_HEIGHT

    build_title_slide(prs)
    build_executive_summary(prs)
    build_revenue_overview(prs)
    build_revenue_breakdown_pie(prs)
    build_quarterly_comparison(prs)
    build_profit_loss(prs)
